Description_lang: Start building your house with many basic room shapes. Welcome Home!
You may place 200 points of Decor in your yard.

You will obtain a Hearthlight Armillary, an impressive device capable of manipulating ambient light within and around its owner's house, either to dim or enhance it.|n|nAdditional copies can be purchased from the Last Architect in your neighborhood.
You may now use medium-size house exteriors for your house.

Name_lang: Room and Decor Placement Budget Bonuses
Description_lang: Gain an additional 10 Room Placement Budget and 500 Decor Placement Budget at this level.

Name_lang: Room and Decor Placement Budget Bonuses
Description_lang: Gain an additional 10 Room Placement Budget and 500 Decor Placement Budget at this level.
You may now place an additional 50 points of Decor in your yard, for a total of 250.
